source: IATA AHM 730 standard delay codes (passenger/cargo/baggage coding — 00 to 99). This list reflects the industry-standard numeric codes. Airlines may use internal sub-codes on top; v1 tracks only the two-digit IATA code.

codes.name: No delay reason
codes.description: Used when no delay or reason recorded

codes.name: Scheduled ground time under planned
codes.description: Scheduled ground time less than declared minimum

codes.name: Late check-in
codes.description: Acceptance after deadline

codes.name: Late check-in
codes.description: Congestion in check-in area

codes.name: Check-in error
codes.description: Passenger and baggage

codes.name: Oversales
codes.description: Booking errors

codes.name: Boarding
codes.description: Discrepancies and paging, missing checked-in passenger

codes.name: Commercial publicity / passenger convenience
codes.description: VIP, press, ground meals and missing personal items

codes.name: Catering order
codes.description: Late or incorrect order given to supplier

codes.name: Baggage processing
codes.description: Sorting etc.

codes.name: Documentation, errors
codes.description: Late presentation

codes.name: Aircraft documentation late/inaccurate
codes.description: Weight and balance, general declaration, passenger manifest

codes.name: Loading / unloading
codes.description: Bulky, special load, cabin load, lack of loading staff

codes.name: Loading equipment
codes.description: Lack of or breakdown

codes.name: Servicing equipment
codes.description: Lack of or breakdown; lack of staff

codes.name: Fueling / defueling
codes.description: Fuel supplier

codes.name: Catering
codes.description: Late delivery or loading

codes.name: ULD
codes.description: Containers, pallets

codes.name: Technical equipment
codes.description: Lack of or breakdown; lack of staff; e.g., pushback

codes.name: Scheduled maintenance
codes.description: Late release

codes.name: Non-scheduled maintenance
codes.description: Special checks and/or additional works beyond normal maintenance

codes.name: Spares and maintenance equipment
codes.description: Lack of or breakdown

codes.name: AOG spares
codes.description: To be carried to another station

codes.name: Aircraft change
codes.description: For technical reasons

codes.name: Standby aircraft
codes.description: Lack of planned standby aircraft for technical reasons

groups.label: Damage to Aircraft and EDP/Automated Equipment Failure

codes.name: Damage during flight operations
codes.description: Bird or lightning strike, turbulence, heavy or overweight landing, collision during taxiing

codes.name: Damage during ground operations
codes.description: Collisions other than during taxiing, loading/off-loading damage, contamination, towing, extreme weather

codes.name: Flight plan
codes.description: Late completion or change of flight documentation

codes.name: Operational requirements
codes.description: Fuel, load alteration

codes.name: Late crew boarding or departure procedures
codes.description: Other than connection and standby (flight deck or entire crew)

codes.name: Flight deck crew shortage
codes.description: Sickness, awaiting standby, flight time limitations, crew meals, valid visa, health documents, etc.

codes.name: Flight deck crew special request
codes.description: Not within operational requirements

codes.name: Late cabin crew boarding or departure procedures
codes.description: Other than connection and standby

codes.name: Cabin crew shortage
codes.description: Sickness, awaiting standby, flight time limitations, crew meals, valid visa, health documents, etc.

codes.name: Cabin crew error or special request
codes.description: Not within operational requirements

codes.name: Captain request for security check
codes.description: Extraordinary

codes.name: De-icing of aircraft
codes.description: Removal of ice and/or snow, frost prevention excluding unserviceability of equipment

codes.name: Removal of snow, ice, water, and sand from airport
Ground handling impaired by adverse weather conditions
ATFM due to ATC en-route demand/capacity
codes.description: Standard demand/capacity problems

codes.name: ATFM due to ATC staff/equipment en-route
codes.description: Reduced capacity caused by industrial action or staff shortage, equipment failure, military exercise or extraordinary demand

codes.name: ATFM due to restriction at destination airport
codes.description: Airport and/or runway closed due to obstruction, industrial action, staff shortage, political unrest, noise abatement, night curfew, special flights

codes.name: ATFM due to weather at destination
Mandatory security
codes.description: Passengers, baggage, crew, etc.

codes.name: Airport facilities
codes.description: Parking stands, ramp congestion, lighting, buildings, gate limitations, etc.

codes.name: Restrictions at airport of departure
codes.description: Airport and/or runway closed due to obstruction, industrial action, staff shortage, political unrest, noise abatement, night curfew, special flights

codes.name: Restrictions at airport of departure with or without ATFM restrictions
codes.description: Including Air Traffic Services, start-up and pushback, airport and/or runway closed due to obstruction or weather

codes.name: Load connection
codes.description: Awaiting load from another flight

codes.name: Through check-in error
codes.description: Passenger and baggage

codes.name: Aircraft rotation
codes.description: Late arrival of aircraft from another flight or previous sector

codes.name: Cabin crew rotation
codes.description: Awaiting cabin crew from another flight

codes.name: Crew rotation
codes.description: Awaiting crew from another flight (flight deck or entire crew)

codes.name: Operations control
codes.description: Re-routing, diversion, consolidation, aircraft change for reasons other than technical

codes.name: Industrial action outside own airline
codes.description: Excluding ATS

codes.name: Other reason not listed
codes.description: Free-text reason required
